PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Oct-09-2019 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Sep-11-2019 Continued To Oct-09-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Eric Davidson for Selby Scalberg (Administrator).

The Court stated that it needs courtesy copies of the petition and a proposed order, and that the petition needs to be supplemented to provide the names and the dates of death of the deceased Parents. Mr. Davidson stated that he gave a courtesy copy of the petition to the Clerk in Room 202 and provided a proposed order in open Court. The Petition for Letters of Administration is continued to October 9, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Aug-14-2019 Continued To Sep-11-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
